title: Message Envelope
description: Normalized message envelope for inter-agent communication trust telemetry.

message_id.description: Unique message identifier in msg:uuid-v4 format.

parent_message_id.description: Parent message ID for tracing contamination inheritance. Null for session origin messages.

sender.description: Identifier of the sending agent or component.

receiver.description: Identifier of the receiving agent or component.

execution_phase.description: Agent execution phase. Extensible string — see docs/execution_phases.md for recommended values.

session_id.description: Session identifier for grouping related messages.

trace_id.description: Trace identifier for distributed tracing correlation.

turn_index.description: Zero-based index of the conversation turn within the session.

provenance.description: Ordered list of upstream agent names in the message lineage.

content.description: Message body text. Optional but required for most policy class detection.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the content field in sha256:hex format.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being invoked.

description_raw.description: Raw tool description text. Optional — omitting disables hidden_instruction_embedding detection on tool descriptions.

description_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of description_raw in sha256:hex format.

tool_context.description: Tool invocation context. Present when the message involves a tool call.
